npcs.name: Die Dorfälteste
npcs.speech_style: Short, direct sentences. Present tense. A1 vocabulary.

npcs.name: Brunhilde
npcs.role: Forest seer. Ancient wisdom. Provides mana-powered hints.
npcs.speech_style: Riddles and questions. Modal verbs. Poetic phrasing.

npcs.name: Der Zwergenkönig
npcs.role: King of the mountain dwarves. Formal, demanding.
npcs.speech_style: Formal register (Sie). Dativ case. Numbers and trades.

npcs.name: Die Nixe
npcs.role: Water spirit. Speaks only in questions.
npcs.speech_style: Questions only. Complex sentence structures. Konjunktiv II.

npcs.name: Die Walküre
npcs.role: Disguised warrior ally. Appears in Act II.

npcs.name: Wotan
npcs.role: The god. Appears briefly at the end of the epilogue.
